body.title: D275 impl: GOAL_TACTICAL + GOAL_STRATEGIC as TWM nodes
body.result: D275 implemented: added MemoryType.GOAL (instance-scoped, BASE_INERTIA=0.15) to models.py. Added goal_adopt (GOAL type + TWM push salience=0.85 ttl=7200s), goal_scan (list active goals), goal_close (mark done) to ops.py. All registered. Goals now persist across turns via TWM. 567 tests pass.
body.description: Implement goal-as-thread (D275). GOAL_TACTICAL: success_condition (checkable), current_strategy (engram pointer), failure_count, deadline TTL, why (motivation chain), spawned_by (parent goal). Preempts action nodes when active. Dies on success_condition met. GOAL_STRATEGIC: domain, activation_weight, no success_condition, near-infinite TTL, tilts BG scoring field continuously. Both stored in memories table (new GOAL type) + live in TWM.
